$schema: Agent template migration registry. Used by sync-l0 to detect breaking changes and guide consumers through upgrades.

1.0.0.note: Initial PM template  --  flat dispatch model, architect gates

1.1.0.note: Added pre-flight checklist, context management, token budgets

2.0.0.note: 3-phase model replaces flat dispatch. DISPOSABLE dev rule. Execution trigger.
2.0.0.migration_hint: PM now orchestrates 3 sequential teams (Planning → Execution → Quality Gate). Devs must be spawned as anonymous Agent(prompt=...) without name/team_name. Run /sync-l0 to get the updated template.

5.1.0.note: Added persistent architect lifecycle, PRE-TASK context-provider consult protocol, supersede guardrails

5.6.0.note: Move HARD GATE to line 19 (blockquote, immediately after identity sentence). Add git diff/show/log to FORBIDDEN actions as code-reading vectors. Resolve commit contradiction: PM orchestrates commits via architects, does not run git add/commit directly. Remove How to Start section (absorbed into identity line).
5.6.0.migration: L1/L2 projects must run /sync-l0 to pick up HARD GATE repositioning

5.7.0.note: Add explicit planner spawn block to Planning Delegation section. Planner joins session team as named peer with subagent_type=Plan, enabling SendMessage to context-provider.

5.8.0.note: Hub refactor: extracted PM prose to 4 sub-docs in docs/agents/ (pm-session-setup, pm-dispatch-topology, pm-verification-gates, pm-quality-doc-pipeline). Template slimmed to ~180 lines. No behavioral changes.

5.9.0.note: Add SESSION CLOSURE GATE — blocks session end when acceptance criteria failing

5.10.0.note: MECHANICAL enforcement: Grep and Glob removed from PM tools. Tools list now consistent with FORBIDDEN rule in body.
5.10.0.migration: L1/L2 projects must run /sync-l0 to pick up tools line change. PM body already forbids Grep/Glob — no behavior change.

5.11.0.note: T-BUG-010: added WHO-READS-THIS warning at top of body. Clarifies template is for main-conversation (team-lead), not a spawnable peer. FORBIDDEN: Agent(name="project-manager", ...). If spawned AS peer, exit. Fixes L2 dual-PM issue where team-lead did both TeamCreate and Agent(project-manager).

5.12.0.note: T-BUG-015: added Search Dispatch Protocol — when user task involves pattern search, route to context-provider FIRST, then dispatch to architect with results. Forbids 'use grep' dispatches to architects/devs. Closes the Bash-grep bypass of L0 PR #40 mechanical enforcement.

5.13.0.note: W19-S2b: added Per-Session Gate block — Grep/Glob/Bash blocked until CP consulted (hook PR #51)

5.14.0.note: W22: model opus→sonnet (S1), spawn-prompt diet ≤25 lines + agent-core-rules.md (S2), mandatory rtk prefix rule (S3)

5.15.0.note: W23: S8 token meter + retrospective file rule; Bug #5 fix (scope_doc_path field replaces hardcoded .planning/PLAN.md); Bug #6 fix (PREP/EXECUTE mode tagging on architect dispatch). Adds Model Profiles + Architect Dispatch Modes + Token Meter sections.

1.0.0.note: Initial planner as sub-agent spawned by PM

1.1.0.note: Planner is now a Planning Team PEER (not sub-agent). Uses SendMessage.
1.1.0.migration_hint: Planner must have SendMessage in tools and describe itself as 'team peer', not 'sub-agent spawned by PM'.

1.4.0.note: Backfill: version 1.4.0 present in template, missing from registry

1.5.0.note: MECHANICAL enforcement: Grep and Glob removed from planner tools. Existence check at Step 1.5 rewritten to delegate to context-provider via SendMessage.
1.5.0.migration: Planner no longer runs Grep directly. Route existence checks through context-provider.

1.6.0.note: W19-S2b: added Per-Session Gate block — Grep/Glob/Bash blocked until CP consulted (hook PR #51)

1.14.0.migration: Update arch-testing to remove any direct Grep/Glob calls. Route all pattern lookups through context-provider via SendMessage.

1.15.0.note: T-BUG-011 + T-BUG-012: OBS-A Scope Extension Protocol upgraded to HARD SELF-GATE (wave-distance + specialty + PLAN.md pre-checks; REFUSE extensions N+2 or cross-specialty). NEW Reporter Protocol section: PM liveness check before SendMessage, [PM-absent] fallback to team-lead when PM shut down. Prevents lost verdicts to dead PM.

1.16.0.note: T-BUG-015: added Bash Search Anti-pattern section. FORBIDDEN bash grep/find/rg/fd/ag/sed/awk for pattern searching — Bash is for git/gradle/test only. Pattern lookups MUST SendMessage(context-provider). Closes the Bash bypass of L0 PR #40 mechanical Grep/Glob removal.
